Overview

This article is about the Spawn Island. For the C2S4 version of it, see Helicarrier 64.

Spawn Island (or Starter Island) is the location where every player spawns before entering a Battle Bus or the Storm Tsunami (Update v39.00) that takes players over to the main Island. It acts as a pre-game lobby in order to gather up the amount of players needed to start the match. Once all players are gathered, a 10 second timer starts and the match begins. The Spawn Island is not visible on the Map, but is visible from the main Island. Although referred to as Spawn Island, it is not always presented as one, rather it is just a location where players spawn, named as such, due to it being an Island for the longest time.

Consistent Features

Consistent Features[]

As the Spawn Island acts as a waiting area for the match to start, it contains many loot spawns. The loot at Spawn Island is usually Weapons and Ammunition, but Materials also spawn here. Players can build, destroy the environment, gather loot, and attack players except for their teammates. Loot gathered in this location will not transfer to the start of the game and is taken from the loot pool of the current Season/Playlist. Players cannot lose health on Spawn Island, however they can lose shield if they have any.

A Battle Bus was always present on Spawn Island in some form prior to Chapter Seven.

History

History[]

  • Chapter 1
  • Chapter 2
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 4
  • Chapter 5
  • Chapter 6
  • Chapter 7

  • S0
  • S2
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8
  • S9
  • SX

Update v1.6[]

  • The first version of the Spawn Island was added.

Update v1.11[]

  • A Christmas tree was added.

Update v2.2.0[]

  • The Christmas tree was removed.

Update v6.20[]

  • Halloween decorations were added for the Fortnitemares 2018 Event.

Update v6.21[]

  • November 3rd 2018: The halloween decorations were removed as the Fortnitemares 2018 Event ended.

Update v6.31[]

  • Near the end of the season, snow began to fall on the Spawn Island.

Update v7.00[]

  • Spawn Island is now covered in snow.

Update v8.00[]

  • Spawn Island is now jungle-themed.

Update v9.00[]

  • Spawn Island is now futuristic-themed.

Update v10.00[]

  • Due to The Zero Point's reality wave, Spawn Island became a mixture of all its previous versions.
  • Mid-season, TV's randomly started appearing on Spawn Island.

The End[]

  • Spawn Island was sucked into The Black Hole.

  • C2S1
  • C2S2
  • C2S3
  • C2S4
  • C2S5
  • C2S6
  • C2S7
  • C2S8

Update v11.00[]

  • There is a whole new Spawn Island. It currently consists of a more beach-like theme with sand at the edges of the island.
  • The new island is now located north of Pleasant Park.

Update v11.30[]

  • Spawn Island is now covered in snow.

Update v11.40[]

  • The snow has melted.

Update v11.50[]

  • A mysterious screen has appeared on the Spawn Island. Currently the screen is displaying a glitched visual.

Update v12.00[]

  • Several GHOST and SHADOW recruitment posters have appeared around Spawn Island.
  • Two secret bases has appeared under Spawn Island, one belonging to GHOST, and the other belonging to SHADOW.

Update v13.00[]

  • Spawn Island has turned into an area on floating rafts surrounded by small islands of rubble.

Update v14.00[]

  • Spawn Island has been replaced with a flying Helicarrier 64.

Update v14.60[]

  • November 21st 2020: A timer has appeared above Spawn Island.

The Devourer of Worlds[]

  • Helicarrier 64 was destroyed by Galactus.

Update v15.00[]

  • Spawn Island has been reverted back to how it was from Season 1 to Season 6 but with Chapter 2 graphics. Ironically this spawn island is exactly where the old spawn island used to be (Southwest of Slurpy Swamp).

Update v16.00[]

  • Spawn Island is still fully intact, however, it has been affected by a Reality Wave.

Update v17.00[]

  • An Imagined Order Facility was built on the island.

Update v18.00[]

  • One of the Abductors crashed into the island, destroying the IO Facility.

The End[]

  • Spawn Island was turned upside down during the flipping of the island.

  • C3S2
  • C3S3
  • C3S4

Update v20.00[]

  • Imagined Order bombed the island.

Update v21.00[]

  • Most of the buildings on Spawn Island is now covered in graffiti.

Update v21.40[]

  • A Reality Root has made it to Spawn Island with a branch of reality tree.

Update v21.50[]

  • The Reality Tree bloomed.

Update v22.00[]

  • Graffiti on the buildings was removed.
  • Several floating platforms were added.
  • Bomb craters, caused by IO's attack on the island, are now patched.

Fracture[]

  • Spawn Island was removed following the explosion of Reality Zero.

  • C4S1
  • C4S2
  • C4S3
  • C4S4
  • C4SOG

Update v23.00[]

  • The Zero Point pulls in chunks of different realities, that became the new Spawn Island. It remains in space outside Asteria.

Update v23.20[]

  • 3 groups of 7 stars have appeared near the island.

Update v24.00[]

  • A chunk of MEGA City's land appeared.

Update v25.00[]

  • A chunk of The Ancients' jungle appeared.

Update v26.00[]

  • A chunk of the Eclipse's estate appeared.

Update v27.00[]

  • Original Spawn Island from Seasons 1-6 has returned due to

The Big Bang[]

  • Spawn Island was sucked into The Black Hole once again.

  • C5S1
  • C5S2
  • C2R

Update v28.00[]

  • Spawn Island was re-designed once again.

Update v29.10[]

  • April 2nd 2024: Shade Midas now spawns here as a Character.

Update v29.20[]

  • Shade Midas no longer spawns here as a Character.

Update v32.00[]

  • Spawn Island has been reverted back to its Chapter 2 form with the return of Apollo. It has moved to the northwest side of the island.

  • C6S1
  • C6MS2

Update v33.00[]

  • A new Spawn Island is available.

Update v38.00[]

  • A new cel-shaded Spawn Island is available. For reasons unknown, the player is unable to build on spawn island.

Update v38.10[]

  • The player can now build on spawn island.

  • C7S1

Update v39.00[]

  • A new Spawn Island is available.
  • December 1st 2025: Dark Voyager's Cradle is above Spawn Island.
  • December 2nd 2025: Dark Voyager's Cradle is aimed directly at Spawn Island.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • In the first 3 chapters, there has been numerous methods that allowed players to travel to Spawn Island in-game.
    • Building out towards Spawn Island and then speeding up a Shopping Cart.
    • Building out towards Spawn Island and then speeding up a Whiplash with full fuel for boost.
    • Flying a Choppa or Saucer high towards Spawn Island.
  • Additionally, the Spawn Island in Chapter 2 Remix had no barriers at all, meaning players could simply just swim, take a Motorboat or a Choppa there after a match had begun.
  • The Battle Bus launch platform had the logo of the Imagined Order on the Chapter 4 Spawn Island.
  • On the Spawn Island...
    • in Fortnite: Reload, it is possible to gain shields.
    • in Chapter 5: Season 2, it was possible to purchase Shield Potions from Ascendant Midas after his arrival.
    • in Fortnite: OG, it is possible to obtain Shield Potions as of Update v33.10.
  • Chapter 2 Remix was the first ever time where a Container would spawn on the Spawn Island, namely the Produce Box.
    • It'd be possible to consume Apples, Bananas, Corn and Cabbage even at apparent max health, if the player took 'damage' from an opponent or by falling.
      • Although players are immune to all sorts of damage on the Spawn Island, they still do take damage internally. This is also evident by the hitmarker sounds that play.
